events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
